Sheet1.Summary: [GEEA3.0_IPB][SWIM-1067157][FX12A2] [SWIM-1062802][P162] EPB applied abnormally when RPA, occasionally
Sheet1.PreClarification:
Expect SW：
1、上层Parking请求在，EPB状态为Applied，保压状态为va3，此时上层Parking请求退出，BCM端不请求EPB拉起
2、LFC主动请求EPB拉起过程中，触发了DAR，需要把ACB的EPB请求reset掉，不再最多请求2s EPB

Actual SW:
上层Parking请求在，EPB状态为Applied，处于保压状态，此时上层Parking请求退出，LFC会请求一次EPB拉起，该请求过程中若EPB状态一直不为applied，该EPB拉起请求最长会发2s，在请求EPB拉起的过程中触发了DAR，DAR优先级高，EPB状态会从applied->releasing->released，当DAR请求退出后，若此时EPB拉起的请求还在，则会继续请求EPB拉起。
Injection Reason:吉利platfrom logic
Non Detection Reason:吉利VDSW逻辑变更，暴露了这个问题
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: TBD
Sheet1.SubCategoryOfGapsDetection: Test case design not refer AS

对于RoPP41项目，如果main和sub需要发送同一个报文，则报文的PduGroup需要特殊设置为ROPP41_Can0_TX。
项目前期版本开发时只有main的需求，所以Tx报文的PduGroup都配置的Can0_TX。
后期版本收到Sub需求时，没有注意到新报文在Main上也有发送，仍然配置了Can0_TX，导致上电后mian和sub同时在发送这封报文。
CT 都是单件mian或者sub测试，cover不到这个场景，所以未测出。
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: CT cover不到这个场景，需要补充针对此场景的Sil测试

CT当时只测了main，sub没有测。
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: 长期方案：前期stream不稳定，还在更改过程中，后续软件stream稳定后，已删除hard code，使用接口。

Sheet1.SubCategoryOfGaps: Lack of analysis of original design
Sheet1.PreClarification:
Direct cause: The regen limit function did not implement a logic to compensate the front motor’s regenerative torque response delay.
Root Cause – Occurrence 
TRC1: The front motor’s regenerative torque response delay was not considered in function design. 

MRC1: Lack of systematic approach to identify corner cases and all potential side effects.


Root Cause – Non-Detection
TRC2:  Specific VTC test cases were not generated 
MRC2: Lack of adequate training for deciding when new VTC test cases are necessary and for developing correct test cases.  

MRC3: same as MRC1 (Design and code reviews were conducted but failed to detect the issue)
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures:
MRC1/MRC3: Implement a mechanism to make identifying corner cases and side effects an explicit, mandatory part of design and review.


MRC2: Define and roll out a guideline for new VTC test‑case design, including triggers for when a new VTC is required and the required contents in the test case.

OBD is common requirement, not distinguish the variant,  so the signal EngNSafe should be received. The structure of OBD code is based on Geely2.0.
P789 is based on L946, but the variant change to EV_AS, which the vehicle is REEV in fact. So the signal will be missed in current structure.
NET not identify the vehicle is REEV which OBD is needed.

Sheet1.Summary: [SERES_X1L_MY25_IPB2.0_ROPP41_BL05_VAF]AVH Activate Threshold Pressure base on Ax sensor is inaccurate, causing vehicle rollback when AVH is activated
Sheet1.PreClarification: 性能匹配时发现，在上坡时快速刹车和缓慢刹车，刹停时估算的坡度axslope不同，缓慢刹停时偏小，有时AVH会溜车，这是由于AX传感器的测量值受刹车力的影响，快速刹车的时候，刹车力造成的偏差值较大无法完全补偿，所以快速刹停时候估算的坡道就会偏大，而缓慢刹停就会偏小。
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: 新增查表参数，对各个减速度下刹停的门限进行重新标定，确保不会溜车

Sheet1.Summary: [DFN] 240 245 246 CAN ID not sent while SubCtrl
Sheet1.PreClarification:
Related with CNMS defect 6016668.

Problem:
In some situations (example: Dual Diagnostic/Flash, abnormal system reset, etc.), Main uC and Sub uC cannot reset at the same time.
Sub uC may take APB control directly after IPB re-start.
In this case, the "Switched App PDU" cannot be sent.

Analysis:
In the faulty situations, RBMESG_RoPPCntrlSwitchActive changes from "NotInitialized" to "Active" while DEM Component FdmRoPP remains NOT FAILDED.
Detailed info is described below docupedia.
https://inside-docupedia.bosch.com/confluence/display/CCEAS3CN/Sub+take+control+in+init
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: If RBMESG_RoPPCntrlSwitchActive_N has stayed in "Active" for longer than 30ms, Sub uC enables sending "Switched PDU".

Sheet1.Summary: [GWM_P03D_FX_Net] Mapping logic judgement delay when receive 2 CAN signals from 2 messages
Sheet1.PreClarification: 对于来自不同报文的两个信号进行组合mapping，软件中以callout的方式实现，将该组合逻辑实现在其中一个信号的BCT callout函数中。这种方式实现的mapping逻辑本身是对的，但是在CAN上另一个信号变化的时候，需要等到实现callout的信号收到才处理，内部可能会晚一定时间（比如20ms）才能把CAN上的变化传递给内部变量。这个现象对某些上层功能可能会产生影响，比如晚激活或误激活。
Sheet1.Comments:
mapping逻辑是对的，但是如果上层对时间响应比较敏感，可能不能满足要求

others - function performance related
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures:
对于不同报文的两个信号进行组合mapping，使用proc实现
Create a new common defect to extend. - Jin Li

Sheet1.Summary: [Chery_IPB_T1GC_PHEV_EU_300778][OTA Test]The value of EPB_ActrSt_L and EPB_ActrSt_R should be 0.
Sheet1.PreClarification:
Precondition:
There are PHEV/EV/ICE in this project.
The FS need always send EPB_ActrSt_L and EPB_ActrSt_R to 0x0 when variant is ICE.
I set the initial value of signal to 0x0 and use (gs_Var_DrvModeWithPower_UB != C_Var_ICE) as the condition.
Root cause:
1.gs_Var_DrvModeWithPower_UB get from function Dem___isVariantActive() but Dem___isVariantActive is in 20ms proc, so gs_Var_DrvModeWithPower_UB can't get correct value when system initialize.
2.the initial value of interface is 0x1 instead of 0x0
Why CT not cover?
netsim and SiL can not cover this case.
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures:
1. all the conditions should be considered when coding.
2. When judging variant, try not to use "!="

Sheet1.Summary: [GWM_IPB2.0_M82_ROPP41]CAN signal #CTABrkAvailable is not sending Available value in the initial phase
Sheet1.PreClarification:
总共有十几个信号需要在初始化阶段和postrun阶段做特殊处理；正常的信号mapping在BSS01和BSS02做的，特殊需求在BSS03实现。
每个信号有两条FS
1. 每个信号的FS：conversion logic里面会提到特殊处理逻辑（CTABrkAvailable FS中没有特殊逻辑的描述）
2. 特殊需求的FS：同一条里面逻辑相同的信号都列在一起（比如很多ADAS 功能available的逻辑在同一条FS），还包含一些本项目不用的信号，因为改FS是common的。
基于以上，跟FO确认过需要做特殊处理的都已经在信号的conversion logic里面有标注，在做特殊需求时，在FS的conversion logic中没看到特殊逻辑，所以没有做。而在做特殊需求的FS时，由于好几个信号一起，又有些信号在IPB2.0上没有用到，筛选的时候漏掉了。

Sheet1.Summary: [GWM_Common_RPA] [Common]: The request for EPB apply was unsuccessful during the RPA activation process
Sheet1.PreClarification:
Expect SW: RPA上层请求完EPB释放后又请求EPB拉起然后直接退出，希望EPB保持拉起不要释放。
Actual SW:  RPA上层请求完EPB释放后又请求EPB拉起然后直接退出，EPB只释放没有响应拉起导致卡钳最后释放了。
Injection Reason: Corner case, GWM RPA 不是CNMS 标准RBU RPA，而是P档冗余RPA，在上层请求EPB拉起的时候，正好卡钳处于一边夹紧一直正在释放状态，导致APC认为此时卡钳是夹紧的没有将上层的夹紧请求发给PBC。
Non Detection Reason: 比如：1.Corner case，发生的概率极低，也和上层的发送逻辑有关。2.CNMS测出过这个case，但是修复在RBU 冗余的RPA方案里，导致客户特殊的P档冗余RPA没有收到这个修复。
Sheet1.Comments: To be checked
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: N.A. Corner case

Sheet1.Summary: [297241_XPeng_IPB2.0_H93aS_BSS0403]: OBD-related diagnosis finding fix
Sheet1.PreClarification: xPeng require PID 04,05,0c no need support, so code changes in manufacture function instead of turn off function switch, result in PID 00 response incorrect. No CT and review because time urgent.
Sheet1.Comments:
Background:
During the development of the OBD requirement on the XP H93AS project, due to insufficient resources and tight schedule, another DCOM-PR engineer, Zhang San, was assigned to support the development of this requirement. 

Issue description and root cause:
Under the OBD Mode 01 service, the customer required that PIDs 04, 05, and 0C should not be supported. At that time, Zhang San directly handled this within the Manufacture function instead of disabling the corresponding Function Switches (according to his feedback, there were some compilation issues, but the details are unclear now). 

After he made the changes, he performed a simple test in the SIL environment because the customer urgently needed the software. 

The testing was as follows: 

     01 04 → No response, meeting the requirement
     01 05 → No response, meeting the requirement
     01 0C → No response, meeting the requirement
     

However, PID 01 00 (which is used to indicate which PIDs from 01 to 20 are supported) was not tested. 

The result was that the returned bit flags for PIDs 04, 05, and 0C in 01 00 were set, indicating these PIDs were still marked as supported, which did not comply with the customer’s requirements. 

After Zhang San left the company, the customer submitted their test specifications and requested a test report. When performing tests according to their spec, I discovered this issue (the customer had not yet reported it, so it’s suspected they had not tested the problematic software). I informed PCM and asked PCM to notify the customer. 

PCM considered it necessary to track this issue and created this Defect. Since Zhang San had left, the Defect was assigned to me.
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: Add this knowledge point into the quarterly exam questions.

Sheet1.Summary: [290683_VWA_IPB2.0_CMP21D_MEB31_BSS0301][CSW] Wrong CNT definition for sample order OE-000320793
Sheet1.PreClarification:
When: 2025.05.13
Where: VWA MEB31 Plant
What: MEB31 PVS sample failed to complete Evac & Filling process
Customer P/N: 1ED 614 100 A
Bosch P/N: 0265B6A0M6-01
How many: 50 pcs. (35 pcs. at VWA Plant + 15 pcs. at Bosch stock)
Direct cause:  Evac&Filling needs to check VWA MEB31 PN(Part Number), the PN is wrong in CNT(EEPROM Container File) file, and the wrong PN causes Evac&Filling failure(Correct MEB31 PN: 1ED 614 100 A; actual PN given is 2F1 614 100 for CMP21D)
Risk evaluation: Sample Evac & Filling Failure at VWA Plant
Sheet1.Comments:
Root Cause – Occurrence 
TRC: VWA PN is defined in CNT file. MEB31 sample order was released in the sample system with the wrong CNT file selected(CMP21D).
     Comments: MEB31 and CMP21D share the same Software BB No.(Bosch Bestellnummer) w/ different CNT file to distinguish the target project.
               
MRC: MEB31 and CMP21D share the same software BB No. but VWA PN is different. For this case, different project info should be merged into one CNT file, separately by Multi-data attributes, rather than divided into two CNT files.
 
Root Cause – Non-Detection
MRC: The CNT review process for sample release lacks check points for CNT content and sample order consistency.
     Comments: Current check list for sample release, there is no consistency check for CNT content and sample information. Only do the file name-based consistency check via Software BB No. and CNT file w/ no finding.
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures:
Corrective actions – Occurrence 
TRC：Maintain the correct CNT file in MEB31 sample order for 14 pcs new samples production(OE-000320793 sample order plan 64 pcs: 50 pcs produced+14 pcs not produced).   Resp. Zhang Cynthia Due date: 5/16
                
MRC：One Software(BB No.) only uses one CNT file, different VWA PN is written in different multi-data area in one CNT file, Bosch EOL station can map multi-data content for the target project via PN.  Resp. Shanquan   Due date: 5/23

Corrective actions – Non-Detection 
MRC：In the sample release process, add consistency check point between order content and CNT file.           Resp. Xu Jue     Due date: 5/23

Sheet1.Summary: [LIA_A24_EMB_BL01_Build53] when switching to HSM series mode, a frame length overflow error comes out while TKWIN connection
Sheet1.PreClarification: The case is that after performing HSM key injection and switching to series mode, a power cycle was carried out. When attempting to connect to TKwinx with smartcard, the error "Received flow status OVERFLOW" was reported.
Sheet1.Comments:
Rootcause：
When HSM is conducting challenge/response, TKWINX will send a message with a total length of 960 bytes to the ECU through the 27 66 service. When the RX buffer size is configured not enough, the Flow control frame showing overload will be sent and the TKWINX error will be reported. In this defect case, the size of the RX buffer is set to 512, which is inherited from platform.
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures:
Suggestion:
Sharing on the function meeting. If there are similar error reports, the problem can be located and solved quickly.
Sheet1.FocusMeasure: [Manual Mistake] 24.6 - Find and solve technical debt

Sheet1.Summary: [GEEA3.0_RBU][R3] L946 E2E check report repeated error, signal mapping can not send correct value to Internal Interface
Sheet1.PreClarification:
geely E2E 计算按照信号名字字母大小写顺序排列，并非像其他项目一样按照PDU byte的顺序计算，这样导致rba nds生成的代码不符合客户的需求，需要手动修改rbands 生成的代码，把rawsignal 按照字母顺序放在一个数组中计算

原因：RBU的E2E校验是在Com层（Com_RxCbk），运行task是5ms，只要收到报文了就开始校验，但是E2E算法中拿的rawsignal信号是上一次收到的值（原因是rawsignal的解析在comscl层RxSignalCopy函数中，运行task为10ms，运行在Com_RxCbk之后）。如果10ms的task稍微有点偏差，上一次收到报文信号值还没有来得及拷贝给rawsignal，那么counter的校验取的就是上上次的两个相同的counter值，会报出E2E的repeated错误。
做法是follow 以前的项目经验做的

解决办法：把Comscl层的signalcopy函数也放在5ms，让rawsignal尽快拷贝更新。

Sheet1.Summary: [Xiaomi_P_DPB_EC1] DTC list is not the same between customer and software.
Sheet1.PreClarification:
Expect SW: 在用诊断仪19 0A读PBC fault时，由于该项目使用2PBCin1host，在用万安PBC lib的车上，读到只属于万安的pbcfault
Actual SW:  比如：在用诊断仪19 0A读PBC fault时，由于该项目使用2PBCin1host，在用万安PBC lib的车上，读到不属于万安的pbcfault
Injection Reason: 万安的PBC在PBC init时，不会发出PBC status为not support
Non Detection Reason: HOST在逻辑中，有对PBC fault status为 not support的fault做出压制，不会被19 0A读到，理论上不需要额外做逻辑。但是该压制逻辑只会在PBC init阶段运行，但是该万安PBC在PBC init时，PBC fault status为not init，所以压制逻辑不起作用。
Sheet1.Comments: PBC not follow our requrirement, PBC update SW

Sheet1.Summary: [GAC_T9M_IPB1_1] [Rx]FW ADC_10_CRC or ADC_10_Counter Report  signal ACNMSG_ADSComAvailability_B not False
Sheet1.PreClarification:
For messages using signal group,  checksum and counter error cannot make ComScl_EvaluateRxPdu False. They work in ComScl_EvaluateRxSigGrp. Thus, when checking if message received correctly without CHK/ALC/DLC/TO error, ComScl_EvaluateRxSigGrp should be used for message with signal group implemented in it.
When getting to know this, there are already several projects SRed and several projects running.
Sheet1.Comments:
The related code is common used by all projects on the stream. Some use signal group but some are not. This makes the fix and test are not a small task. 
Also, FO checked the MM6 result and confirmed that it doesn't affect the functionality by using ComScl_EvaluateRxPdu.
Besides, considering the possibility of checksum/counter error is quite small on vehicle, it was planned to fix in the new stream. So the code was not fixed until SWT. 
However, test-pr thinks after all the SW behavior was different from FS and that's a reason for this defect.
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures:
If the stream is just started, fix code ASAP;
If the code is used by many projects but not affect functionality, put the fix plan and SW deviation clearly in FS, making it clearly for test-pr.

Sheet1.Summary: [ZEEA2.0_IPB][R2][SWIM-426835] [CC1E] EPB cannot be activated on P.
Sheet1.PreClarification:
Expect SW: 先操作button释放卡钳，再操作button夹紧卡钳，最终卡钳应当拉起。
Actual SW:  最终卡钳没有拉起。
Injection Reason: 特殊需求GearShiftRelease中，会监控APBCtrlReq，如果在收到出P出N释放卡钳时有其他的apply请求，应当压制release。但是以前设计的使用的是ROPP42 debounce200ms后的APBCtrlReq，而不是主侧host判断的没有延迟的APBCtrlReqLoc。当驾驶员操作button很快的时候，就会出现这个问题。
Non Detection Reason: 吉利动力是有挡位联动的，卡钳释放会切D档，拉起会入P。实验室无法发现，并且整车层级出现概率很低，也没有发现。
Sheet1.Comments:
根本原因是逻辑走到了出P/出N的driveoff导致卡钳释放了。
• 驾驶员操作EPB button释放EPB，由于挡位联动，GearLvrIndcn从P到D，此时gear shift监控时长2s开始计时；
• 在约1.78秒后，驾驶员再操作EPB button夹紧EPB，约0.15秒之后卡钳由released变为applying；
• 由于仍然在gear shift的2s监控时长内，并且卡钳状态不再是released或着releasing，再次触发出P释放，导致卡钳applying被打断，进入releasing，最终released；
fix 方案：GearShiftRelease改为接收APBCtrlReqLoc，规避使用ROPP42 200ms delay的APBCtrlReq
Sheet1.ImprovementMeasures: fix 方案：GearShiftRelease改为接收APBCtrlReqLoc，规避使用ROPP42 200ms delay的APBCtrlReq
